display_name: High-performance image generation with top of the line prompt following, visual quality, image detail and output diversity. This is a more efficient version of FLUX-pro, balancing quality and speed.
description:
High-performance image generation with top of the line prompt following, visual quality, image detail and output diversity. This is a more efficient version of FLUX-pro, balancing quality and speed. 

Optional parameters:
Aspect ratio. Valid aspect ratios are 16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 9:16.  

Note: Send an image to have this model reimagine/regenerate it via FLUX Redux.
